title: Skeleton Lord takes opponent cemetery creature as Limited Summon

card.rawText: When summoned, take control of 1 of your opponent's creatures in their cemetery as your Limited Summon. Return it back to your opponent's cemetery if this creature leaves the field, changes control, or this effect is negated.

effect.value: Take control as your Limited Summon

plan.title: Skeleton Lord takes opponent cemetery creature as Limited Summon
plan.summary: When summoned, verify Skeleton Lord takes control of an opponent cemetery creature as a Limited Summon.

notes: Move an opponent creature to cemetery before Skeleton Lord resolves.
